name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A Controls
description: Representative Annex A information security controls mapped to Azure. Summaries are paraphrased; the standard itself is licensed content.

controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.summary: Management-approved security policies exist, are communicated, and reviewed.
controls.remediation: Maintain versioned security policies in the repo/wiki, map them to Azure Policy assignments, and review annually.

controls.title: Inventory of information and assets
controls.summary: Information and associated assets are inventoried with assigned owners.
controls.remediation: Mandatory owner/classification tags via Azure Policy; export inventory with Resource Graph.

controls.title: Access control
controls.summary: Rules limiting access to information and assets are established and enforced.
controls.remediation: RBAC with least privilege, Conditional Access, and documented access-control rules per data classification.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.summary: Identity lifecycle (joiner/mover/leaver) is managed for people and systems.
controls.remediation: HR-driven provisioning to Entra ID, automatic deprovisioning, and workload identities via managed identity.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.summary: Credentials are allocated and managed securely; users are guided on handling them.
controls.remediation: MFA enforcement, banned-password lists, secrets in Key Vault with rotation, no shared credentials.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.summary: Privileged access is restricted, allocated on need, and reviewed.
controls.remediation: PIM eligible assignments with approval and MFA, quarterly privileged access reviews.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.summary: Measures detect and prevent unauthorized disclosure of sensitive information.
controls.remediation: Purview classification/DLP, block public blob access, egress control via Firewall, and alert on mass-download anomalies.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.summary: Backups are maintained and tested per the agreed policy.
controls.remediation: Azure Backup/PITR with immutability, offsite copies, and scheduled restore testing.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.summary: Networks, systems, and applications are monitored for anomalous behavior.
controls.remediation: Diagnostic settings to Log Analytics, Defender alerts, Sentinel analytics, and defined triage ownership.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.summary: Cryptography rules, including key management, are defined and implemented.
controls.remediation: Document crypto standards (TLS 1.2+, AES-256), manage keys in Key Vault/Managed HSM with rotation.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.summary: Secure coding principles are applied to software development.
controls.remediation: SAST/SCA in CI, code review gates, input validation standards, and OWASP training for developers.
